title: READ: Indictment of James Comey | CNN Politics
text:
Source: CNN

A federal grand jury on Tuesdayindicted former FBI Director James Comeyon charges of making a threat against President Donald Trump and transmitting a threat in interstate commerce.

The indictment, which marks the administration’s second attempt to prosecute the longtime Trump rival, centers on a photo of seashells Comey posted on social media last year that officials say threatened the president.
